title: SHOWERS AND LAUNDRY - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER SHOWERS AND LAUNDRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry facilities and hot showers with shampoo, soap, and a towel. Change of underclothes provided when available. Showers limited to 15 minutes. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Showers: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm Laundry: Tuesday-Thursday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 771-7914 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. First come, first served. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 82nd and Cornwell are the nearest cross streets. Located near the intersection of 82nd and Johnson Creek Boulevard. Turn left on Cornwell, just past the Fred Meyer parking lot and O'Reilly Auto Parts. Served by TriMet Bus Line 72 (82nd Avenue). Services: Laundry Facilities Public Showers/Baths Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND MEALS MATERIAL GOODS - PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES AND NEEDLE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER
